---
title: "Caleb Mogyabiyedom"
image: photo.JPG
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/caleb-mogyabiyedom-0a3715275/
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      href: https://github.com/elevenw11se
    - text: Email
      icon: envelope
      href: mailto:koficaleb11@gmail.com
---

### Economics × Data Science × Financial Markets

I'm a data analyst with a background in economics, focused on turning messy, 
real-world data into clear insights, particularly in financial markets and 
emerging economies. I work primarily in R, Python and Excel, building analyses and 
tools that sit at the intersection of quantitative research and storytelling.

---

**What I do:**

- Exploratory data analysis and data visualization
- Financial and market research
- Automation and data pipelines
- Economic analysis with a focus on emerging markets

---

*Currently building out this portfolio. New projects added regularly.*
